title: Enhanced UI
description: Enhance your vanilla UI with overall cleaner UI elements and hot-bar visuals! (previously Enhanced-HotBar)
body:
![Closeup of Enhanced Hotbars, Hotbar. with improved Hearts, Hunger, And Armor Icons alongside a cleaner and simplistic look.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a65b150d36f9101233de52744fb7e90773ae83c.png) ## Previously Enhanced Hotbar A small project that originally focused on refreshing the hotbar with a few light ui adjustments. **Enchanced UI** expanded into polishing and refining HUD elements while keeping the vanilla look of Minecraft intact. ## Final Release - v0.1.1 This was the last update before the project was archived. - Completed Experience Bar and Boss Bar redesigns - Adjusted Offhand slot to be more vibrant with a warmer gold tone. - General visual cleanup and consistency tweaks. ___ ## Looking for something in development? If you liked this tweak and my current work, you may be interested in my current project: [![GrimVeil Mod Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6c829167ae2364e66c02d94b717073af7ba19b9_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/grimveil) A dark exploration mod that adds **The Lost Woods**. A hostile, hand-crafted region filled with a new encounter, material, and structures. Designed to be uncovered through observation and exploration rather than guided progression. Actively developed and expanding.
Available exlusively on Modrinth: [**GrimVeil**](https://modrinth.com/mod/grimveil)
